creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

would it be possible to provide a little more information (a website,
mailing list, things like that)?  As I am not exactly sure what you want
to have as "description" of the user group.

Examples on what other groups have written can be found under
http://www.freebsd.org/usergroups.html.

Regards.

jkois


-- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
